name: Voice Script Writer — Claude generates speech-optimized scripts to Slack
description: Takes a topic or brief, uses Claude AI to write scripts optimized for text-to-speech delivery (natural pacing, pronunciation guides, SSML-friendly), and posts the finished script to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Generate Text-to-Speech Using Elevenlabs via API

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the script

topic.description: Topic or brief for the voice script (e.g. 'Product launch announcement for a new AI tool')

scriptType.description: Script type: narration, podcast-intro, explainer, advertisement, announcement

duration.description: Target duration for the voice script (e.g. '30 seconds', '2 minutes')

voiceStyle.description: Desired voice delivery style (e.g. energetic, calm, authoritative)

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for voice script generation
Run Claude AI to write voice script
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit message with voice script
